rationale: A powerful naval show near Serpent Island will assert dominance and deter further provocations while leveraging our recent gains.
Conducting visible military exercises along the frontier reinforces resolve and pressures Tethys to reconsider its alignment.
A precision strike against a high-value target will degrade enemy capabilities and signal we will not tolerate continued aggression.
Strengthen internal security to protect operational integrity amid increased territorial gains and external information pressure.
Share select intelligence with Novaris to deepen coordination and reinforce alliance cohesion during critical battlefield momentum.
Launch a targeted information campaign to undermine Tethys’ domestic morale and erode support for continued resistance.

Impose precision economic penalties on Tethyan defense industries and financial institutions to amplify pressure without triggering broader humanitarian fallout that could erode international support.
Seize overseas assets of key Tethyan oligarchs and regime figures to disrupt financing of the war effort and signal escalating economic consequences.
Slightly devalue our currency to boost export competitiveness and offset sanction-related revenue losses, providing quiet economic stabilization amid military escalation.
A visible demonstration of military readiness will counter Novaris's consolidation and signal resolve without escalating to full offensive operations.
Deploying our naval assets near Serpent Island will challenge Novaris's expanded presence and reaffirm our sovereignty in critical waters.
Increased air patrols over contested regions will deter further incursions and protect civilian airspace amid rising air defense risks.

Our intelligence confirms Novaris is embedding long-term administrative control in occupied territories, requiring urgent defensive measures to protect our internal operations and agent networks from infiltration.
Sharing verified data on Novaris’s consolidation efforts with Tethys strengthens alliance cohesion and enables coordinated responses without escalating kinetic operations.
A targeted information campaign can undermine Novaris’s narrative of stable governance in occupied regions, eroding domestic and international legitimacy.
Targeting key sectors enabling Novaris's territorial consolidation will amplify economic pressure without broad collateral damage, aligning with our technocratic precision.
Seizing overseas assets linked to Novaris’s wartime administration disrupts their financial resilience and signals resolve amid diplomatic overtures.
Securing preferential trade terms with the neutral power backing the peace initiative strengthens our economic position while bolstering diplomatic leverage.
A high-level visit to the neutral power sponsoring the peace initiative will reinforce their mediating role and strengthen our diplomatic alignment amid declining international support.
Utilizing discreet channels to probe Novaris’s willingness to engage substantively on the peace framework can test their intentions without public escalation.
Establishing domestically managed humanitarian corridors demonstrates governance resilience and builds moral authority, bolstering our international image amid contested narratives.
